title: Galliym #1554
definition:
Gallim = "springs"

 1) a place north of Jerusalem, home town of the man to whom Michal,
    Saul's daughter, David's wife, was given as wife by Saul even
    though she was already married to David
nasbUsage:

    Saul's daughter, David's wife, was given as wife by Saul even

    NASB:  heaps, a place near Jer.
